steps.title: Use the kite's movement
steps.content: The text says Gogol's father raises a kite "into the wind" until it is so high that Gogol must tip his head back. In context, the word describes moving the kite upward.

steps.title: Choose the upward meaning
steps.content: A would mean making the kite from scratch, but the action is flying it. B applies to praising a person, not a kite. C would mean making it stronger, which does not explain the height. The contextual meaning is to lift. The answer is D.
